case_title: OPORTUN INC. (FOMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL COPR.) VS. JOSE STYVENS PAZ ALMENDAREZ

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FOMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL COPR.) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALMENDAREZ, JOSE STYVENS PAZ $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,615.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-17-2017 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO OCT-19-2017 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY, REPRESENTED BY MARIA BLANC, LEGAL SPECIALIST. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE $65.00 SERVED AUG-23-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ALMENDAREZ, JOSE STYVENS PAZ

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. (FOMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL COPR.) AS TO DEFENDANT ALMENDAREZ, JOSE STYVENS PAZ ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-17-2017 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-19-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-19-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY PRISCILLA TOVAR, LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT JOSE STYVENS PAZ ALMENDAREZ. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FOMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL COPR.)
